race.comment: DARN HOT LADY (3) returns for the Edmonds camp and has been readied with three solid hitouts. Has good tactical speed and gets in light with the 3kg claimer engaged. Can return with a bang. DA SNOOP DOG (1) has been poised to pounce in both runs back this prep but has just lacked killer instinct. Peaking now and has enough early dash to cross from the wide draw. Expecting him to give a bold sight. PERMISSION GRANTED (4) built nicely into his debut prep, closing the campaign with a dominant maiden win at Ballina. Is expected to have progressed during the break and returns with two trials under his belt. Has a stiff draw to overcome but looks one of the main hopes. STEFFI ELECTRICA (7) never really got going last time in after showing promising signs in the prep prior. Readied with just the one trial and is worth monitoring. Last start maiden winner PAPARACHA (16) is another to keep an eye on.
